asset.title: Startup Diligence War Room
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: Excellent walkthrough demonstrating multi-agent startup diligence, public/private scoping, and draft handoffs with clear state changes.

featureClarity.evidence: Demonstrates multi-agent research and private scoping, though the dense UI requires close attention.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the full flow from pending queue to enrichment and final draft generation.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark mode layout, but high information density can feel cluttered.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with NodeRoom's core concepts of sheets, private agents, and trace logs.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing real-time trace updates and state transitions.

legibility.evidence: Small text in the trace log and sidebar is somewhat difficult to read at standard sizes.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly valuable for financial analysts and startup diligence workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: Honest representation of draft-based handoffs requiring human approval.

observedEvidence: Room trace log updating in real-time

defects.observed: High text density in the Room Trace log makes it hard to quickly read the payload details.
defects.fix: Slightly increase line height or highlight key status changes in the trace log.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Run concurrent multi-agent startup diligence and securely draft handoffs in private or public workspaces.
